allow: Bash(npm create vite@latest chicoffee-temp -- --template react 2>&1 && ls chicoffee-temp)

Bash(cd /Users/antoniobunicic/IdeaProjects/EstiaPayments/chicoffee/src/assets/images && \\
cwebp -q 82 hero.jpg -o hero.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 interior.jpg -o interior.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 concept-store.jpg -o concept-store.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 menu/strip.jpg -o menu/strip.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 menu/matcha.jpg -o menu/matcha.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 menu/coffee.jpg -o menu/coffee.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 menu/pink-matcha.png -o menu/pink-matcha.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 menu/ice-tea.png -o menu/ice-tea.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/interior.jpg -o nar/interior.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/interior-2.jpg -o nar/interior-2.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/cover.jpg -o nar/cover.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/gallery-1.jpg -o nar/gallery-1.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/gallery-2.jpg -o nar/gallery-2.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/gallery-3.jpg -o nar/gallery-3.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 nar/gallery-4.jpg -o nar/gallery-4.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 kontakt/cover.jpg -o kontakt/cover.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 specialty-coffees.jpg -o specialty-coffees.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 specialty-coffee/speacialty1.jpg -o specialty-coffee/speacialty1.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 specialty-coffee/speacialty2.jpg -o specialty-coffee/speacialty2.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 specialty-coffee/speacialty3.jpg -o specialty-coffee/speacialty3.webp && \\
cwebp -q 82 specialty-coffee/speacialty4.jpg -o specialty-coffee/speacialty4.webp && \\
echo "DONE")

Bash(\\
convert \\
  -size 1200x630 \\
  src/assets/images/hero.webp \\
  -resize 1200x630^ \\
  -gravity Center \\
  -extent 1200x630 \\
  \\\( -fill "rgba\(15,10,5,0.45\)" -draw "rectangle 0,0 1200,630" \\\) \\
  -composite \\
  \\\( src/assets/images/logo.svg -resize 340x340 \\\) \\
  -gravity Center \\
  -composite \\
  public/og-image.jpg && echo "Done")

Bash(\\
magick \\
  src/assets/images/hero.webp \\
  -resize 1200x630^ \\
  -gravity Center \\
  -extent 1200x630 \\
  \\\( +clone -fill "rgba\(15,10,5,0.5\)" -colorize 100 \\\) \\
  -composite \\
  \\\( src/assets/images/logo.svg -resize 360x360 \\\) \\
  -gravity Center \\
  -composite \\
  public/og-image.jpg && echo "Done")

Bash(\\
magick src/assets/images/hero.webp -resize 1200x630^ -gravity Center -extent 1200x630 /tmp/og-bg.jpg && \\
magick /tmp/og-bg.jpg \\
  -fill "rgba\(15,10,5,0.5\)" -draw "rectangle 0,0 1200,630" \\
  \\\( src/assets/images/logo.svg -background none -resize 360x360 \\\) \\
  -gravity Center -composite \\
  public/og-image.jpg && echo "Done")
